title: Professor Heinz Wolff's Gravity
short_description: A physics-based puzzle game inspired by the TV scientist, challenging players to use the laws of gravity to solve increasingly inventive contraptions.
description: Professor Heinz Wolff's Gravity is a physics puzzle game based on the popular British TV personality and scientist. Players must use their understanding of gravity and physics to position objects so that a ball reaches its target. Featuring over 100 puzzles across multiple environments, the game combines education with entertainment in a series of increasingly devious challenges.
